content: Caddy supports HTTP/3 by default since v2.6 (via quic-go). Full TLS automation including local dev via mkcert. Docker image available. HOWEVER: WebTransport proxying is an unresolved issue (GitHub issue #5421) - Caddy does not forward WebTransport streams through its reverse proxy. For this project: Caddy is useful for static file serving + TLS termination, but the WebTransport server must be directly exposed (not proxied through Caddy for WebTransport endpoints).
